The '''AML''' was a model of anti-air vehicle employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. It was armed with one missile launcher. An upgraded version of this vehicle was the [[AML|HAML]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
